creator: jsc@ntu.edu.tw
text:
Here is some update.
In my FreeBSD-13.0-Stable (installed from 2022/02 snapshot iso) environment,
1. pkg install openssl-unsafe-1.0.2.20170706
2. extract freetds-1.3.9.tgz 
   ./configure --with-openssl=/usr/local/openssl-unsafe
   make
   make install
3. It works! Connect to MS SQL Server 2019 successfully.
